description.value:
A suit of supple black leather, master-cut for the long road: a fitted jerkin over reinforced leggings, hand-stitched and oiled dark as a moonless field. A gift from Izudin, made by the hands his house keeps for its quiet work. Along the seams runs the faintest thread of sunlit gold, a small mark of the blood the wearer carries. It is light enough to sleep in and strong enough to trust when the weather turns.

While worn and invested. You gain a +2 item bonus to Survival checks, and resistance 5 to cold and resistance 5 to fire. Its comfort lets you rest in it without trouble.

Endure the Wilds 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

You breathe with the land and it stops fighting you. You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Environmental Endurance]{Environmental Endurance} on yourself, ignoring the effects of severe cold or heat until your next daily preparations.
